Seaweeds on Singapore shores: photo index

seaweeds text index seaweeds

Division Chlorophyta | Division Cyanophyta | Division Phaeophyta | Division Rhodophyta Photo index of seaweeds on Singapore shores

        GREEN SEAWEEDS sheets, ribbons, filaments feathery, serrated strips sphere, sausages , blobs fans, disks , branched         RED SEAWEEDS sheets, ribbons fleshy stems, beads soft hairy, feathery,
filaments hard branching, encrusting         BROWN SEAWEEDS

sheets, ribbons

discs, leaves, branched, blobs, other shapes

These are NOT seaweeds, they are seagrasses
see the seagrass photo index

Spoon seagrass Halophila ovalis complex

Needle seagrass Halodule pinifoliaand H. univervis

Tape seagrass

Sickle seagrass Thalassia hemprichii

Fern seagrass Halophila spinulosa

how to tell apart

  • different feathery green seaweeds
  • feathery seaweeds from seagrasse
